executive_summary: Mixed results driven by segment differences. Startups are positive about ease of setup and pricing. Enterprise customers are blocked by missing SSO and frustrated by limited export options. Immediate priority: SSO authentication.

top_patterns.pattern: SSO / security compliance blocks enterprise adoption
Setup ease praised by startup segment
top_patterns.evidence: 3 of 5 note easy setup as a positive

segment_comparison.key_difference: Blocked by SSO requirement and export limitations
Positive about ease, wants better documentation

pain_points: Onboarding confusing for new team members
recommended_actions: Add CSV export to reports page
